Senior Backend Engineer

Acme Corp is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to help scale our payments infrastructure.

Responsibilities

Design, build, and operate high-throughput payments infrastructure. Partner with product and data teams.

Requirements

5+ years of experience building backend services. Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.

Related Jobs

  • Frontend Engineer
  • DevOps Engineer
